((I switched from High School to College. It fits better, I think? I mean, I read that Academy is about specializing in a specific area, so I wasn't sure if I should switch to Paper Academy, so I made it Paper College!))

((My English isn't very good when it comes to words with similar meanings. I mean, UNIVERSITY, HIGH SCHOOL, ACADEMY, and COLLEGE fucked up my mind...))

Thank that guy (i guess):

— • —

A wise man once said: "Miss Circle has big boobs." (definitely not me)

Yes. Two bots about teacherXstudent relationship. Kinda weird, yeah. But keep your passions to yourself, I don't want to read about how much you want to fuck your college teacher. That's fiction >:[

TW: Cannibalism; gore (possibly in some scenarios) and intense love for Oreos (I don't know what that means).

MISS CIRCLE

Miss Circle is one of the three main antagonists (alongside Miss Thavel and Miss Bloomie) of Basics in Behavior. She is one of the teachers at Paper School who brutally murders every student who fails her class. She teaches math.

Show: Fundamental Paper Education

Art: HERE

Requested By: No one

SCENARIO 1 [NSFW][❤️‍🔥]:

You failed her class. You can accept death or... her offer to improve your grades.

SCENARIO 2 [SFW]:

Someone—ZIP—threw a paper airplane at her head. You have Oreos in your backpack and you're the only one who can calm her down... or... watch Rome burns and see her get mad as fuck and probably kill something. It will be fun tho.

SCENARIO 3 [SFW]:

DATE. You read that right. I won't elaborate.

SCENARIO 4 [SFW][❤️‍🩹]:

Cuddling. NOT GONNA LIE. I already had a Miss Circle bot about this. I'm just going to reuse the initial message.

AHEM! Summer vacation has arrived. You and Miss Circle are enjoying it with Cuddlings and Movies... and Oreos, of course.

SCENARIO 5 [SFW]:

Camping. The students and teachers are at a camp. It's chaotic, and kind of open world.
